banners.title: 1Eco Park Green Canopy Walk

banners.title: 2Patna Planetarium Cosmic Show
banners.subtitle: Journey through stellar galaxies at IGSC. Near Income Tax Station.

banners.title: 3Gandhi Sangrahalaya
banners.subtitle: Trace the visual archives of Mahatma Gandhi. Near Gandhi Maidan Station.

banners.title: 4Sanjay Gandhi Biological Park
banners.subtitle: Enjoy wildlife safari and botanical gardens with family. Near Zoo Station.

interstitials.title: 1Bihar Eco Park Direct entry
interstitials.description: Redeem this voucher code for 20% discount on boating and greenhouse entries.

interstitials.title: 2Nalanda Bookstore Terminal
interstitials.description: Get 10% off on Patna Metro travel guides, history maps, and bestsellers.

interstitials.title: 3Metro Brew Coffee Lounge
interstitials.description: Sip fresh brewed Araku coffee. Quick takeaway counter at Khemnichak Interchange.
